tool.name: scholar_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple academic queries on Google Scholar in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling scholar_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'transformer attention mechanism,CRISPR gene editing,quantum computing'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'deep learning,natural language processing,computer vision')
